name: ai-receptionist
description: Polish-first multi-tenant voice AI receptionist (vertical-agnostic core).

scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm -F @ai-receptionist/contracts build && pnpm -F @ai-receptionist/backend build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm -F @ai-receptionist/web build && pnpm verify:rules
